subject: ap-calculus-bc
unit_name: Parametric Equations, Polar Coordinates, and Vector-Valued Functions

cards.prompt: A pair of equations $x = f(t)$, $y = g(t)$ that define $x$ and $y$ in terms of a third variable $t$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A parametric curve has a horizontal tangent when $\frac{dy}{dt} = 0$ and $\frac{dx}{dt} \neq 0$, and a vertical tangent when $\frac{dx}{dt} = 0$ and $\frac{dy}{dt} \neq 0$. The point where both are zero is called a

cards.prompt: A polar curve of the form $r = a + b\cos\theta$ or $r = a + b\sin\theta$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A polar curve of the form $r = a\cos(n\theta)$ or $r = a\sin(n\theta)$ that produces petal-shaped graphs

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Number of petals for the rose curve $r = a\cos(n\theta)$ when $n$ is odd vs. even
cards.answer: n \text{ petals if } n \text{ odd},\quad 2n \text{ petals if } n \text{ even}
